N2001 Drug Regimen Review - The data in this column indicates whether a complete drug regimen review identified potential clinically significant medication issues. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether a complete drug regimen review identified potential clinically significant medication issues. 0 = No - No issues found during review
1 = Yes - Issues found during review
9 = NA - Patient is not taking any medications
404 N2003_MDCTN_FLW_UP_IND N2003_MDCTN_FLW_UP_IND N2003 Medication
